mapper.select: SELECT S.shipment_num, S.shipment_id, TO_CHAR(S.shipment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shipment_date, S.shipment_status, S.plan_qty, E.ename, W.ename AS worker_ename, I.name, V.vender_name FROM shipment S JOIN emp E ON S.emp_num = E.emp_num LEFT JOIN emp W ON S.worker_num = W.emp_num JOIN shipment_request SR ON S.shipment_request_num = SR.shipment_request_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num ORDER BY S.shipment_num DESC

SELECT S.shipment_num, S.shipment_id, TO_CHAR(S.shipment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shipment_date, S.shipment_status, S.plan_qty, E.ename, W.ename AS worker_ename, I.name, V.vender_name FROM shipment S JOIN emp E ON S.emp_num = E.emp_num LEFT JOIN emp W ON S.worker_num = W.emp_num JOIN shipment_request SR ON S.shipment_request_num = SR.shipment_request_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num WHERE 1 = 1
AND S.shipment_status = #{status}
AND SR.item_num = #{item_num}
AND ( upper(V.vender_name) LIKE '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' OR upper(S.shipment_id) LIKE '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND S.shipment_date >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND S.shipment_date < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND S.shipment_date < SYSDATE + 1
AND S.shipment_status NOT IN ('출하완료', '취소')
ORDER BY
S.shipment_date ASC S.shipment_num DESC

SELECT S.shipment_num, S.shipment_id, TO_CHAR(S.shipment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shipment_date, S.shipment_status, S.plan_qty, S.shipment_request_num, E.ename, E.emp_num, I.name, I.item_num, V.vender_name, SR.request_id, SR.request_qty, TO_CHAR(SR.request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, TO_CHAR(SR.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date FROM shipment S JOIN emp E ON S.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN shipment_request SR ON S.shipment_request_num = SR.shipment_request_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num WHERE S.shipment_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT SL.shipment_lot_num, SL.lot_num, SL.qty, L.lot_code, TO_CHAR(L.lot_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lot_date, TO_CHAR(L.expiry_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS expiry_date, I.name AS item_name FROM shipment_lot SL JOIN lot L ON SL.lot_num = L.lot_num JOIN item I ON L.item_num = I.item_num WHERE SL.shipment_num = #{_parameter} ORDER BY L.lot_date ASC

SELECT L.lot_num, L.current_qty, TO_CHAR(L.lot_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lot_date FROM lot L JOIN item I ON L.item_num = I.item_num WHERE L.item_num = #{_parameter} AND UPPER(I.type) = 'PRODUCT' AND L.current_qty > 0 AND L.expiry_date >= SYSDATE AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shipment_lot SL JOIN shipment S ON SL.shipment_num = S.shipment_num WHERE SL.lot_num = L.lot_num AND S.shipment_status != '취소' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM io io2 JOIN qc q ON io2.qc_num = q.qc_num WHERE io2.lot_num = L.lot_num AND UPPER(q.qc_pass) = 'PASS' ) ORDER BY L.lot_date ASC

SELECT SR.shipment_request_num, SR.request_id, TO_CHAR(SR.request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, TO_CHAR(SR.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date, SR.request_qty, V.vender_name, I.name, I.item_num FROM shipment_request SR JOIN request_status RS ON SR.status_num = RS.status_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num WHERE RS.status_name = '접수' ORDER BY SR.shipment_request_num DESC
SELECT emp_num, ename FROM emp WHERE status = 'Y' ORDER BY emp_num
SELECT emp_num, ename FROM emp WHERE e_level = 1 AND status = 'Y' ORDER BY emp_num
SELECT emp_num FROM shipment WHERE shipment_id = #{shipmentId}
SELECT worker_num FROM shipment WHERE shipment_id = #{shipmentId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SHIPMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO shipment (shipment_num, shipment_id, emp_num, worker_num, shipment_date, shipment_status, plan_qty, shipment_request_num) VALUES (#{shipment_num}, 'SHIP' || LPAD(#{shipment_num}, 4, '0'), #{emp_num}, #{worker_num}, NVL(TO_DATE(#{shipment_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), SYSDATE), '출하대기', #{plan_qty}, #{shipment_request_num})
INSERT INTO shipment_lot (shipment_lot_num, shipment_num, lot_num, qty) VALUES (SHIPMENT_LOT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{shipment_num}, #{lot_num}, #{qty})
mapper.select: SELECT SL.lot_num, SL.qty, L.item_num, L.current_qty, L.expiry_date FROM shipment_lot SL JOIN lot L ON SL.lot_num = L.lot_num WHERE SL.shipment_num = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO io (io_num, io_type, io_qty, io_date, qc_num, lot_num, io_reason, facility_num, emp_num, qc_chked) VALUES (io_seq.NEXTVAL, '출고', #{qty}, SYSDATE, 0, #{lot_num}, #{io_reason}, 3, #{emp_num}, 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT S.shipment_num, S.shipment_id, TO_CHAR(S.shipment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shipment_date, S.shipment_status, S.plan_qty, E.ename FROM shipment S JOIN emp E ON S.emp_num = E.emp_num WHERE S.shipment_request_num = #{_parameter} ORDER BY S.shipment_num DESC
SELECT item_num, name FROM item WHERE UPPER(type) = 'PRODUCT' ORDER BY name
mapper.insert:
SELECT LOT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO lot (lot_num, lot_code, item_num, order_num, init_qty, current_qty, lot_date, expiry_date) VALUES (#{lot_num}, 'LOT-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || #{lot_num}, #{item_num}, NULL, #{qty}, #{qty}, SYSDATE, #{expiry_date,jdbcType=DATE})
INSERT INTO lot_split (lot_split_num, origin_lot_num, split_lot_num, split_date) VALUES (LOT_SPLIT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{origin_lot_num}, #{split_lot_num}, SYSDATE)
